if test "gnutls" = "gettext-tools"; then \
  /usr/bin/mkdir -p /var/tmp/portage/net-libs/gnutls-3.8.13/image/usr/share/gettext/po; \
  for file in Makefile.in.in remove-potcdate.sed quot.sed boldquot.sed en@quot.header en@boldquot.header insert-header.sed Rules-quot      Makevars.template; do \
    /usr/lib/portage/python3.13/ebuild-helpers/xattr/install -c -m 644 /var/tmp/portage/net-libs/gnutls-3.8.13/work/gnutls-3.8.13/po/$file \
		    /var/tmp/portage/net-libs/gnutls-3.8.13/image/usr/share/gettext/po/$file; \
  done; \
  for file in Makevars; do \
    rm -f /var/tmp/portage/net-libs/gnutls-3.8.13/image/usr/share/gettext/po/$file; \
  done; \
else \
  : ; \
fi
